heroHeadline: Day 36: Iran Executes Opposition Members; Chinese Firms Selling Iran War Intel Exposing US Positions
heroSubtitle: Iran executed two convicted members of a banned opposition group as the US-Israel war continues. Separately, Chinese firms are reportedly marketing intelligence from the conflict that allegedly exposes US force positions, per Washington Post. The April 6 Hormuz deadline looms with no sign of Iranian compliance.
footerNote: Data updated 2026-04-04. Sources include CENTCOM, IDF, IRNA, Hengaw, HRANA, Al Jazeera, Reuters, Associated Press, CNN, CNBC, Bloomberg, IEA, DW, The Intercept, Pakistani Foreign Ministry, Washington Post.
